metadata.criteria: Low LDL cholesterol impact, low glycemic index, low sodium, low saturated fat. Suitable for borderline high LDL, hypertension, fatty liver.

vegetables.health_rationale: Fresh vegetables are universally beneficial for LDL, hypertension, and fatty liver. Leafy greens, cruciferous vegetables, and mushrooms are particularly valuable. Zero saturated fat, low sodium, high fiber, rich in antioxidants.

seafood.health_rationale: Omega-3 fatty acids in fish actively lower triglycerides and inflammation. Fish is the primary dietary source of EPA/DHA. Lean white fish is extremely low in saturated fat. Aim for 2+ servings per week.

meat_lean_options.health_rationale: Meat should be consumed in moderation for these conditions. Only the leanest cuts are included. Skinless poultry and pork tenderloin are the best options. Avoid processed meats, sausages, and high-fat cuts entirely.

items.name: Boneless & Skinless Chicken Thighs Frozen 1.5 lb

items.name: Pork Tenderloin, Frozen 2-2.5 lb

snacks.health_rationale: Snacking is where most people fall off track. These picks focus on seaweed (iodine, minerals), konjac (zero calorie), nuts/seeds in moderation (unsaturated fats), and naturally dried fruits.

items.name: Orihiro Konjac Jelly 0 Calories, Kyoho Grape, Muscat & Mango Flavor 24pcs 432 g
items.health_note: Zero calorie snack! Konjac/glucomannan fiber is filling and supports digestion.

dairy_and_eggs.health_rationale: Low-fat/non-fat dairy and plant-based alternatives are best for high LDL. Greek yogurt provides probiotics for gut health. Eggs are fine in moderation (dietary cholesterol has less impact than saturated fat). Plant-based milks avoid saturated fat entirely.

items.name: Chobani Greek Yogurt Non Fat Plain 32 oz
items.health_note: Non-fat Greek yogurt - high protein, probiotics, zero fat. Excellent for gut health.
items.name_zh: Chobani 0脂肪希腊酸奶 32 盎司

seasoning_healthy_picks.health_rationale: Seasonings are critical - they determine sodium intake. Use reduced-sodium soy sauce, vinegar (acetic acid helps blood sugar), and spices/herbs instead of salt. Avoid heavy sauces.

items.name: Lee Kum Kee Sodium Reduced Seasoning Soy Sauce 16.9 g
items.health_note: ESSENTIAL - reduced sodium soy sauce. Switch from regular soy sauce to cut sodium significantly.
